en_title: Avengers: Doomsday and Secret Wars Directors Rule Out a Third Movie, Both Are a 'Complete Expression'
cn_title: 《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》《秘密战争》导演确认：没有第三部
subtitle: 两部曲，不拆了
opus_summary: 《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》与《秘密战争》的导演罗素兄弟在SXSW伦敦站明确表示，这两部电影将构成一个完整的故事表达，不会拆分为三部曲。此前有传闻称《秘密战争》可能分上下部，但罗素兄弟否认了这一可能，并称目前与漫威的合作止于《秘密战争》。他们透露《毁灭之日》的主拍摄已于去年完成，但即将进行补拍以加入新场景和角色，随后将开始《秘密战争》的拍摄。罗素兄弟还表示，MCU将随着《毁灭之日》的上映「回到零阶段」，不再依赖过去。

paragraphs.en: Avengers: Doomsday and Secret Wars directors Joe and Anthony Russo have ruled out the possibility of a secret third movie, saying the upcoming blockbusters will be a "complete expression" of the story they want to tell.
paragraphs.cn: 《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》与《秘密战争》的导演乔·罗素和安东尼·罗素已排除了秘密第三部电影的可能性，称这两部即将上映的大片将构成他们想要讲述的故事的「完整表达」。

paragraphs.en: Speaking at SXSW London, via Deadline , the Russos did not rule out collaborating with Marvel again at some point in future — though did say that 2027's Secret Wars would cap off their current involvement with the MCU.
paragraphs.cn: 罗素兄弟在SXSW伦敦站通过Deadline表示，他们不排除未来某个时候再次与漫威合作的可能性——但确实表示，2027年的《秘密战争》将为他们目前与MCU的合作画上句号。

paragraphs.en: Fans had previously speculated that Avengers: Secret Wars could be split in two, forming a new Avengers trilogy. Previous reports had suggested that Marvel was considering the idea , and fans had pointed to the sheer number of characters and plotlines the upcoming two films will need to juggle — potentially making a third film necessary. And, of course, a third film would also generate a chunk of extra money.
paragraphs.cn: 粉丝此前曾猜测《复仇者联盟：秘密战争》可能被拆分为两部，从而形成新的复仇者联盟三部曲。早前的报道曾暗示漫威正在考虑这个想法，粉丝们也指出，即将上映的两部电影需要处理的角色和剧情线数量庞大——可能使得第三部电影成为必要。当然，第三部电影也会带来一大笔额外收入。

paragraphs.en: That is definitely not the case, however, the Russos have now said.
paragraphs.cn: 然而，罗素兄弟现在表示，情况绝非如此。

paragraphs.en: "The stories that we're focused on now are complete," Anthony Russo said. "Doomsday and Secret Wars speak with one another as two films and they form a complete expression. Whether or not we all collaborate with Marvel beyond that is certainly a possibility, but right now, the vision, the narrative vision is just for Secret Wars."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们现在专注的故事是完整的，」安东尼·罗素说。「《毁灭之日》和《秘密战争》作为两部电影相互呼应，构成了一个完整的表达。我们是否会在那之后继续与漫威合作，当然是有可能的，但眼下，这个愿景、这个叙事愿景只到《秘密战争》为止。」

paragraphs.en: "We're going to see what we look like in photos in 2028 and then we'll let you know," joked Joe Russo, suggesting that the experience may age them.
paragraphs.cn: 「我们会看看2028年照片里的自己是什么样子，然后再告诉你，」乔·罗素开玩笑说，暗示这段经历可能会让他们变老。

paragraphs.en: Principal filming on Avengers: Doomsday wrapped last year, though the movie is believed to soon be entering reshoots that will add in new scenes and further characters whose actors were unavailable last year. Filming will then begin on Avengers: Secret Wars after that.
paragraphs.cn: 《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》的主拍摄已于去年完成，不过据信该片即将进入补拍阶段，将加入去年演员无法到场的新场景和更多角色。之后，《复仇者联盟：秘密战争》将开始拍摄。

paragraphs.en: "We are doing some work still on Doomsday and will be until probably they rip it out of our hands in November," Joe Russo said, "and that just means they have to give it to other people, to finish it for a few weeks. And then we're [also] in the middle of what we would call pre-production [on Secret Wars]. We like doing many things at the same time."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们还在做《毁灭之日》的一些工作，大概会一直做到11月他们把它从我们手里抢走，」乔·罗素说，「那意味着他们得交给其他人，再花几周时间收尾。然后我们（也）正处于我们所谓的《秘密战争》前期制作阶段。我们喜欢同时做很多事情。」

paragraphs.en: As part of the same discussion, the Russos stated that the MCU was going "back to phase zero" with the release of Avengers: Doomsday , rather than "leaning on anything from the past." Avengers: Doomsday arrives this December 18. Avengers: Secret Wars is currently set to launch a year later, on December 17, 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 在同一场讨论中，罗素兄弟表示，随着《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》的上映，MCU将「回到零阶段」，而不是「依赖过去的任何东西」。《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》将于今年12月18日上映。《复仇者联盟：秘密战争》目前计划在一年后，即2027年12月17日上映。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。你可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。
